## Drug Coverage

| Drug | Tier | Status | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| gabapentin oral capsule 100 mg, 300 mg, 400 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| gabapentin oral solution 250 mg/5 ml, 300 mg/6 ml (6 ml) | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| gabapentin oral tablet 600 mg, 800 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| gabapentin oral tablet extended release 24 hr 300 mg, 600 mg | Not on Formulary | Not on Formulary (Not Covered) | — |
| gabapentin oral tablet extended release 24 hr 450 mg, 750 mg, 900 mg 26 | Non-Preferred | Covered | Prior Authorization |

_Find your drug's tier in the Drug Coverage table above, then locate that tier below to see what you'll pay._

## Your Cost

| Drug Tier | In-Network | Out-of-Network |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Tier 1 — Preferred Generic drugs | $25 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 1 — Preferred Generic drugs | $50 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 4 — Non-Preferred drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $500 maximum per drug In-Network Specialty Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Specialty Pharmacy |
| Tier 4 — Non-Preferred drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Mail-Order Pharmacy |
| Tier 4 — Non-Preferred drugs | 20% of the allowed amount up to a $250 maximum per drug In-Network Retail or Mail-Order Pharmacy | Not covered Out-Of-Network Retail or Mail-Order Pharmacy |
source: Essentials Formulary Drug List (E4) | Pages 31 || Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan | Pages 13, 18
